functions.label: validateMaxDuration
description:
Validate that a duration string does not exceed a maximum duration.
Both values must be valid duration strings.
returnComment: Error message if exceeded, undefined if valid

functions.label: validateMinDuration
description:
Validate that a duration string is not below a minimum duration.
Both values must be valid duration strings.
returnComment: Error message if below minimum, undefined if valid

objects.label: bulkOperationParamsSchema
description:
Schema for bulk operation request bodies.

At least one targeting param must be provided:
- `ids` — explicit list (cannot be combined with filter/search/match_all)
- `filter` / `search` — scoped selection
- `match_all` — explicit opt-in to target every rule

objects.label: createRuleDataSchema
description:
The `.refine` method adds a custom validation to the schema.
In this case, it enforces that the `state_transition` property is only allowed when `kind` is "alert".
The predicate `data.kind === 'alert' || data.state_transition == null` means:
- If the rule kind is "alert", `state_transition` may be present (or absent).
- For any other `kind`, `state_transition` must be `null` or `undefined`.
If validation fails, the specified error message will be associated with the `state_transition` field.

objects.label: ruleResponseSchema
description:

Extends the base rule schema with server-generated fields.

description: Update rule API schema — all fields optional for partial updates
